Class ProductBuilder<T extends Product>

java.lang.Object
src.productcreation.ProductBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of Product object to be built, must extend Product
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<T>
public class ProductBuilder<T extends Product> extends Object implements Builder<T>
Builder class for constructing Product objects with a fluent interface.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductBuilder(T product)
    Constructs a ProductBuilder initialized with the specified product.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductBuilder

      public ProductBuilder(T product)
      Constructs a ProductBuilder initialized with the specified product.
      Parameters:
      product - the product object to be used as the base for building

      owner - the owner to set
      Returns:
      this builder instance for method chaining

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the builder to its initial state. Currently does nothing as the builder uses an existing product reference.
      Specified by:
      reset in interface Builder<T extends Product>

    • create

      public T create()
      Returns the constructed product object.
      Specified by:
      create in interface Builder<T extends Product>
      Returns:
      the built product of type T
